name: How long until I get paid after filing occupational illness in Idaho?
description: 3-day wait, then weeks if approved; longer for appeals.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long until I get paid after filing occupational illness in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-day wait, then weeks if approved; longer for appeals.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Temporary benefits start after 3-day waiting period if totally disabled; full process 4-6 weeks if undisputed.[2] Delays common in disease proofs.[2] Key factors: Prompt filing speeds it; appeals extend months; follow treatment.[2] Track with Industrial Commission portal. Attorney expedites disputes.
